name: snapratio
description: Minimal Mac overlay tool for capturing perfectly cropped social media screenshots

scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --external electron && bun build src/preload.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --external electron && cp -r src/renderer dist/renderer
scripts.start: bun run build && bunx electron dist/main.js
scripts.package: bun run build && bunx electron-packager . SnapRatio --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=out --overwrite --no-asar --ignore='(src|out|tsconfig|\.gitignore)'
